description_long: This is a large, military-style pickup truck with a robust, boxy cab and an extended flatbed cargo area. The cab is painted in a muted olive green, while the cargo bed and wheel arches are a lighter, off-white color. The truck features a reinforced metal frame around the cargo bed, with vertical supports and open sides, suggesting it is designed for transporting goods or personnel. The front grille is prominent, with round headlights and a sturdy bumper, and the vehicle sits on large, rugged tires suitable for off-road or urban utility use. The side mirrors are mounted on extended arms, and the cab appears to have two doors. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and functionality over aesthetics.
description: A large, olive green and off-white pickup truck with a reinforced open cargo bed and rugged tires, designed for utility and transport. The vehicle has a boxy cab, prominent grille, and sturdy metal framing around the bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent grille, round headlights, and sturdy bumper, with the cab's boxy shape and side mirrors visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended cargo bed with open metal framing, two doors on the cab, and large rugged tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, metal frame supports, and the back of the cab, with the tailgate area visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cargo bed structure, cab, and wheel arrangement.
